title: cyperus coriaceus
intro: Cyperus coriaceus, also known as the Rough Cyperus, is a species of sedge that belongs to the Cyperaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Cyperus coriaceus include its ability to relieve digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety as a treatment for various health conditions.
